ALPHA BUILD — Read before continuing

Your vector data is stored UNENCRYPTED on disk.

Do NOT put real personal data, credentials, or sensitive information into this vault. Encryption ships in V0.2 before any beta user receives the product.

Per ADR-010 (HANDOFF.md): this is a documented V0.1-only deviation from BRD §11.5.1.

ALPHA — vector store is unencrypted. V0.2 fixes this.
